name: tdd
description: Test-driven development with a red-green-refactor loop, plus references on deep modules, interface design, mocking, and refactoring.

interface.shortDescription: Build changes with a red-green-refactor loop
interface.longDescription: Implement features and fixes through behavior-focused, vertical red-green-refactor cycles using public interfaces.
defaultPrompt: Implement this change with a red-green-refactor loop.
